blocks.text: Michelle Rose's two-track plan works; hold it, and I would rather choose between real options than talk myself into one early. End of next week is fine, and if the archive is in by then we can mark the outline against actual material instead of guessing at it.

One more item for the Robert Smith request while it is still open: the internal messaging around the turnover, any memos or all-hands notes if they exist. That gap, between what Gallegos, Pope and Marsh said inside the company and what the press ran with, is usually where a reputation audit earns its keep.
I will have the coverage read written up before we sit down, so the {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}} conversation starts from something on paper rather than from memory.
